description_long: This bungalow features a prominent, multi-faceted dark shingle roof with a central chimney and a covered front porch supported by columns. The exterior walls are primarily dark, with sections of exposed brickwork and white trim accentuating the windows and porch. The front facade includes a wide, inviting porch area, while the rear shows a more enclosed structure with visible steps and entryways. Multiple rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged along the sides, providing ample natural light. The roof design is complex, with intersecting gables and a hip section, giving the house a classic Craftsman appearance. The overall structure is low and wide, typical of single-story bungalows found in urban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark, multi-gabled roof, brick and dark exterior walls, and a wide covered front porch supported by columns.
description_view_0: Rear view showing brickwork, steps, and two sets of windows with a central gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical window arrangement and the extension of the porch roof on the right.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide covered porch, columns, and main entrance beneath the prominent gabled roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with symmetrical windows and partial view of the porch extension.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with evenly spaced side windows
